title: Out of the frying pan
summary: import Aside from "../../components/Aside.astro"; I have a friend who once explained to me the concept of a comfort zone and what it means to go outside of it. It happened a good few years ago so my memory is a little hazy, but it came with a useful visual aid. Enjoy my crude rep
